page: Microsoft Azure M16bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MBSMediumMemoryv3 server family. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at a clock speed of 4.0 GHz. The architecture is x86_64, supported by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The CPU includes a 105 MB L3 cache and advanced vector and matrix extensions such as AVX-512 and Intel AMX (Advanced Matrix Extensions) for accelerated mathematical computations.

The server is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, but it is premium storage capable and designed for block storage performance. In terms of performance, the M16bs_v3 demonstrates top-tier single-core capabilities, scoring 2213.0 in Geekbench single-core benchmarks and showing strong performance in single-threaded gzip compression (32.93 GB/sec) and bzip3 decompression (13.73 GB/sec).

Qualitative cost efficiency is driven by its high resource density and dedicated CPU allocation, making it suitable for workloads requiring consistent compute power without the overhead of local storage. Benchmark results show average multi-core performance and memory bandwidth, with a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 1383.1 GB/sec. This hardware profile is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, text processing, and small-scale LLM text generation.
description: Microsoft Azure M16bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBSMediumMemoryv3 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8473C processor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs (8 physical cores) running at 4.0 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM. The server does not include local storage but is premium storage capable, optimized for block storage performance. It exhibits top-tier single-core performance in Geekbench and text processing, alongside strong single-threaded compression speeds. With hardware-accelerated instruction sets like AVX-512 and AMX, the M16bs_v3 is designed for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, and text processing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M16bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB of RAM, and top-tier single-core performance for databases and text processing.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M16bs_v3 is a memory-optimized VM with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and premium block storage capabilities.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated high-frequency Intel Xeon processors and 128 GB of RAM for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz
128.0 GB of RAM providing a high 8.0 GB per core memory-to-vCPU ratio
Top-tier Geekbench single-core and text processing benchmark performance
Premium block storage capability with no local storage included
Optimized for memory-intensive databases, text processing, and small-scale LLM inference
